segment.target: The ring is hitting different on .

segment.source: Staring down from the heavens you see your followers finishing construction of the last of the great temples, ready to begin the work.
segment.target: You mog the entire mortal plane from above and your gyatt army just finished building the last skibidi shrine, fanum tax time.

segment.source: You regard each of the temples in turn. On each is stacked the rings of stone.
segment.target: You edge each skibidi shrine one by one. They got these absolute unit stone rings stacked up on god.

segment.source: The priests far below construct a great harness, and after many years of work, the great stone ring is lifted up into the air, and swung over to the next of the temples.
segment.target: The skibidi priests down there build a whole ohio harness, and after edging for centuries, the massive stone ring gets yoinked into the air and flung to the next shrine. Maximum rizz achieved.

segment.source: The ropes are slashed, and in the blink of an eye it falls once more.
segment.target: They slash the ropes and it falls faster than your sigma grindset. Mewing complete.

segment.source: Your next decree is met with a great feast and many sacrifices. After the funeary smoke has cleared, work to shift the great stone ring begins in earnest. A generation grows and falls, and the ring falls into its ordained place.
segment.target: Your next decree goes absolutely skibidi and they throw a massive fanum feast with hella sacrifices. After the funeral smoke clears (they got rizzless'd), the grind to move the big rock donut begins for real. A whole generation of NPCs spawns and despawns, and the ring finally lands in its designated ohio zone.

segment.source: Years pass as the ring is slowly moved.
segment.target: Literal centuries of edging as the ring slowly gets relocated on god.

segment.source: The priests below fight a war over what colour robes to wear, but while they fall and die, the work is still completed.
segment.target: The priests below start a whole skibidi war over drip but even tho they keep getting fanum taxed into the shadow realm, the grind never stops. W.
